prompt: Render the deck source at plugins/docsmith/evals/sample/deck-sample.md to BOTH the bgn-deck and the claudecode-deck templates as 16:9 PDFs. The inline ```d2 diagram must render once and appear in both outputs.

assertions.text: each PDF page size is 1440 x 810 pts (16:9)
each PDF embeds >=1 image (the shared d2 diagram)
no PDF text layer contains '```d2' or 'direction: right'
